pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_task.sh (line 21: workspace created with name='Finance' at /default-domain/workspaces path) and Nuxeo Platform documentation confirming standard path structure for workspaces
Code analysis of setup_task.sh (lines 72 and 81: both documents created with dc:title='Q3 Financials') and task.json description confirming 'two duplicate documents named Q3 Financials'

privileged_info_summary: The task creates two duplicate documents in the Finance workspace at path /default-domain/workspaces/Finance. Both documents have the title 'Q3 Financials' as shown in the setup scripts. The task requires the user to identify the older document by its Last Modified timestamp and move it to trash while keeping the newer version active. The setup script uses real PDF files from the data directory (quarterly_report.pdf) as document content, but the workspace and document structure are artificially created for this task. The verification checks that exactly one document is trashed, the other remains active, and the workspace contains exactly one active document.
